name: Wirken: MCP entry refused at proxy load
message:
An MCP entry in mcp.json failed signature verification at proxy load. The MCP client never spawned.

Detection: mcp_entry_refused (6)
Severity baseline: high

Fields to pivot on: @wirken.session_id, @wirken.seq, @wirken.event.server_name, @wirken.event.reason.

`reason` is a closed-set snake_case label: signature_invalid, unsigned, signer_key_missing, signer_key_decode_failed, delegation_required. Each names a distinct failure mode at the signature anchor; investigate which mcp.json entry failed and why.

@security-team
